finding_results.notes: Replaced the interchangeable hearsay stack with differentiated crowd voices carrying distinct stakes: contextual memory, burial-record alarm, distant scandal appetite, defensive lived experience, procedural suspicion, and relish-driven social cruelty. Pearl remains the main instigator.
finding_results.summary: The rumor chorus now escalates through socially specific valley voices instead of repeated anonymous hearsay prompts.

summary: Revised the child-row accusation beats to sharpen idiolect separation and keep the scandal escalation overheard, local, and pressure-true.
